description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in dark panels, contrasted by large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. A prominent feature is the rooftop terrace with multiple planter boxes, providing a green outdoor area above the main living space. The house is elevated on stilts at one end, creating a partially open ground level and a visually striking cantilevered section. The main entryway is defined by wide glass doors that open into a spacious, light-filled room with visible dining furniture. Surrounding the base of the house is a border of low greenery, enhancing its integration with an urban or suburban landscape.
description: A modern, boxy house with large windows, a rooftop terrace with planters, and a dark-paneled exterior. The structure is partially elevated on stilts and surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the large glass windows, the rooftop terrace with planters, and the open glass doors leading into a bright interior.
description_view_1: The side view shows a solid dark-paneled wall with minimal windows and the greenery bordering the base.
description_view_2: This angle displays the full length of the house, the extensive window arrangement, and the integration of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the rooftop terrace in detail, the cantilevered section on stilts, and a glimpse into the bedroom through open doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide glass double doors with no visible steps, opening directly to the interior; minimalistic and integrated with the facade.
